name: mcp-server-aws-cloudwatch-logs
description: AWS CloudWatch Logs MCP server for querying and analyzing log data with CloudWatch Logs Insights

rating.reason: Good overall documentation quality with comprehensive descriptions and clear parameter documentation. Tool names are specific and intuitive. Descriptions are detailed (2-4 sentences) covering functionality, usage context, and return values. Parameters include clear descriptions with constraints and examples. The prominent deprecation notices are helpful for users. Minor deduction for some verbosity in descriptions and occasional repetitive phrasing, but overall provides strong guidance for usage.
